steps.t: The Wrights' Fellow-hall lies on the far southern end of the First Circle. Bergil knows of a second, unwatched door into the Cisterns, which might gra…
Bergil waits in front of the Old Guest-house, in the First Circle, just south of the City Gates. Tell Bergil you found the key to the cisterns' hidden…
Gelwen stands in front of the Old Guest-house, in the First Circle, just south of the City Gates. Bergil says two other children, Gelwen and Glatham, …
The door can be found near the Wrights' Fellow-hall, in the southern stretch of the First Circle. Enter the cisterns through the hidden door.
If you get separated from the children, use Bergil's whistle to call them to you. Explore the cisterns with Bergil, Gelwen, and Glatham, and search fo…
The Finding Place lies near the cisterns' exit in the Fourth Circle. The children have spotted something they call the Finding Place. Walk over to it …
The Old Guest-house lies in the First Circle, just south of the City Gates. Meet Bergil and the other children back at the Old Guest-house.
